```{r}
    theme_fig() + theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  # Model-path plot (new for full-corpus: source → date → creator)
  p_model_path <- score_diagnosis %>%
    transmute(score_label, `Source only` = source_only_waic, `+ Date` = best_date_waic, `+ Creator` = best_creator_waic) %>%
    pivot_longer(-score_label, names_to = "stage", values_to = "waic") %>%
    mutate(score_label = factor(score_label, levels = score_order),
           stage = factor(stage, levels = c("Source only", "+ Date", "+ Creator"))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = stage, y = waic, group = score_label, color = score_label)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.95, alpha = 0.9) + geom_point(size = 2.6) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "WAIC") +
    theme_fig() + theme(legend.position = "bottom", axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9.5))

  # ── Save all plots ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  plot_list <- list(
    list(plot = p_orientation,   name = "01_orientation_raw_vs_aligned",  width = 10.8, height = 6.8),
    list(plot = p_auc,           name = "02_orientation_auc",             width = 7.0,  height = 4.8),
    list(plot = p_rank,          name = "03_waic_rank_bars",              width = 11.2, height = 8.8),
    list(plot = p_model_heat,    name = "04_model_heatmap",              width = 11.4, height = 5.2),
    list(plot = p_source_effect, name = "05_source_effects",             width = 7.4,  height = 4.8),
    list(plot = p_date_overlay,  name = "06_temporal_effects_overlay",   width = 9.2,  height = 5.6),
    list(plot = p_creator,       name = "07_creator_effects_extremes",   width = 11.0, height = 8.8),
    list(plot = p_gains,         name = "08_component_gains",            width = 8.4,  height = 6.6),
    list(plot = p_main_models,   name = "09_main_models",               width = 8.6,  height = 4.8),
    list(plot = p_fitted_density, name = "10_fitted_density_by_source", width = 10.6, height = 8.2),
    list(plot = p_model_path,    name = "11_model_path",                width = 7.2,  height = 4.8)
  )
  purrr::walk(plot_list, ~ { print(.x$plot); save_plot(.x$plot, .x$name, plot_dir, .x$width, .x$height) })

  writeLines(c("Full-corpus score modelling summary", "",
    paste0(score_diagnosis$score_label, ": flipped=", score_diagnosis$flipped,
           "; best=", score_diagnosis$best_model_pretty,
           "; main=", main_models$main_model_pretty[match(score_diagnosis$score, main_models$score)],
           "; date gain=", round(score_diagnosis$gain_date_vs_source, 2), " [", score_diagnosis$gain_date_support, "]",
           "; creator gain=", round(score_diagnosis$gain_creator_vs_date, 2), " [", score_diagnosis$gain_creator_support, "]")
  ), file.path(out_dir, "analysis_summary.txt"))

  invisible(list(out_dir = out_dir))
}
```

## Run all analyses

```{r}
analysis_specs <- list(
  manually_labeled      = list(kind = "labeled_main", out_subdir = "inla_effect_audit_v3"),
  christian_and_window  = list(kind = "targeted",     out_subdir = file.path("inla_effect_audit_v3", "targeted_sensitivity")),
  full_corpus           = list(kind = "full_corpus",   out_subdir = "inla_full_corpus_score_audit")
)

palettes <- make_palettes()
dat      <- load_base_data(path, bert_dir)

# Score columns use legacy "ridge" name in the data
fixed_score_cols <- c(
  "score_nb_logit",
  "score_ridge_logit",
  "score_svm_logit",
  "score_xgb_logit",
  "score_lgb_logit",
  "score_bert_logit"
)
fixed_score_cols   <- fixed_score_cols[fixed_score_cols %in% names(dat)]
fixed_score_labels <- set_names(map_chr(fixed_score_cols, pretty_score_fixed), fixed_score_cols)

analysis_results <- purrr::imap(analysis_specs, function(spec, nm) {
  message("\n--- Running analysis: ", nm, " ---")
  switch(
    spec$kind,
    labeled_main = run_labeled_main_analysis(spec, dat, fixed_score_cols, fixed_score_labels, palettes),
    targeted     = run_targeted_analysis(spec, dat, palettes),
    full_corpus  = run_full_corpus_analysis(spec, dat, fixed_score_cols, palettes),
    stop("Unknown analysis kind: ", spec$kind)
  )
})
```

## Full-corpus label-effects figure (saved into the full-corpus results folder)

```{r}
full_corpus_label_effect_figure <- function(spec, dat, palettes, use_saved_fits = TRUE) {
  out_dir   <- file.path(results_path, spec$out_subdir)
  plot_dir  <- file.path(out_dir, "plots")
  table_dir <- file.path(out_dir, "tables")
  fit_dir   <- file.path(out_dir, "fits")
  ensure_dirs(out_dir, plot_dir, table_dir, fit_dir)

  fits_file <- file.path(fit_dir, "full_corpus_label_effect_fits.rds")

  all_score_cols <- names(dat)[str_detect(names(dat), "^score_") & str_detect(names(dat), "_logit$")]
  score_labels   <- set_names(map_chr(all_score_cols, pretty_score_general), all_score_cols)

  aligned <- add_aligned_scores(dat, all_score_cols, score_labels)
  dat_aligned <- aligned$dat

  model_meta_label <- build_labeled_main_model_meta()
  model_levels_label <- model_meta_label$model_pretty

  if (use_saved_fits && file.exists(fits_file)) {
    label_results_full <- readRDS(fits_file)
  } else {
    label_results_full <- setNames(vector("list", length(all_score_cols)), all_score_cols)

    for (sc in all_score_cols) {
      message("Fitting full-corpus label-effect models for: ", sc)
      df_lab <- make_analysis_df(
        dat_aligned,
        paste0(sc, "_aligned"),
        labels = c("non_christian", "christian")
      )
      label_results_full[[sc]] <- fit_grid_inla(
        df_lab,
        build_label_forms(df_lab),
        analysis_name = "full_corpus_label_effects",
        score_name = sc
      )
    }

    suppressWarnings(saveRDS(label_results_full, fits_file))
  }

  label_model_comparisons_full <- safe_bind_rows(lapply(label_results_full, `[[`, "comparison")) %>%
    left_join(model_meta_label, by = "model") %>%
    mutate(
      score_label = recode(score, !!!score_labels),
      model_pretty = factor(model_pretty, levels = model_levels_label)
    )

  if (nrow(label_model_comparisons_full) == 0) {
    stop("No successful INLA model comparisons were produced.")
  }

  write_csv(
    label_model_comparisons_full,
    file.path(table_dir, "full_corpus_label_model_comparisons.csv")
  )

  best_label_models_full <- label_model_comparisons_full %>%
    filter(has_label) %>%
    group_by(score) %>%
    slice_min(waic, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(score, model, model_pretty, waic)

  if (nrow(best_label_models_full) == 0) {
    stop("No successful label-containing models were available to plot.")
  }

  write_csv(
    best_label_models_full,
    file.path(table_dir, "full_corpus_best_label_models.csv")
  )

  label_effects_full_best <- safe_bind_rows(lapply(seq_len(nrow(best_label_models_full)), function(i) {
    extract_label_effect(
      label_results_full[[best_label_models_full$score[i]]],
      label_model_comparisons_full,
      best_label_models_full$score[i],
      best_label_models_full$model[i]
    )
  })) %>%
    left_join(
      best_label_models_full %>%
        rename(
          best_label_model = model,
          best_label_model_pretty = model_pretty
        ),
      by = c("score", "model" = "best_label_model")
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      score_label = recode(score, !!!score_labels),
      score_label = factor(score_label, levels = unname(score_labels)),
      best_label_model_pretty = as.character(best_label_model_pretty)
    )

  if (nrow(label_effects_full_best) == 0) {
    stop("No label effects could be extracted from the fitted models.")
  }

  write_csv(
    label_effects_full_best,
    file.path(table_dir, "full_corpus_label_effects_best_models.csv")
  )

  plot_dat <- label_effects_full_best %>%
    mutate(score_label = factor(score_label, levels = rev(unname(score_labels))))

  xr <- range(c(plot_dat$lower_std, plot_dat$upper_std), na.rm = TRUE)
  xspan <- xr[2] - xr[1]
  if (!is.finite(xspan) || xspan <= 0) xspan <- 1
  xpad_right <- 0.35 * xspan
  xpad_left  <- 0.08 * xspan

  p_full_corpus_label_effect <- ggplot(
    plot_dat,
    aes(x = mean_std, y = score_label, color = prob_positive)
  ) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey65") +
    geom_linerange(aes(xmin = lower_std, xmax = upper_std), linewidth = 0.95, alpha = 0.95) +
    geom_point(size = 2.8) +
    geom_text(
      aes(
        x = upper_std,
        y = score_label,
        label = best_label_model_pretty
      ),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      hjust = 0,
      nudge_x = 0.03 * xspan,
      size = 2.8,
      color = pal_axis
    ) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "#DCEAF4", high = pal_christian) +
    coord_cartesian(
      xlim = c(xr[1] - xpad_left, xr[2] + xpad_right),
      clip = "off"
    ) +
    labs(x = "Christian-label effect / SD(logit)", y = NULL) +
    theme_fig() +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.margin = margin(8, 110, 8, 8)
    )

  print(p_full_corpus_label_effect)

  save_plot(
    p_full_corpus_label_effect,
    "12_full_corpus_label_effects",
    plot_dir,
    width = 8.8,
    height = 4.8
  )

  invisible(list(
    label_results = label_results_full,
    label_model_comparisons = label_model_comparisons_full,
    best_label_models = best_label_models_full,
    label_effects = label_effects_full_best,
    plot = p_full_corpus_label_effect
  ))
}

full_corpus_label_effect_results <- full_corpus_label_effect_figure(
  analysis_specs$full_corpus,
  dat,
  palettes,
  use_saved_fits = TRUE
)
```
